title: etlingera metriocheilos var. major
intro: Etlingera metriocheilos var. major, also known as the large island torch ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Etlingera metriocheilos var. major include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking, particularly in Southeast Asian cuisine.
